title: Too Many Bows
description: An insane amount of epic bows for your adventure!
body:
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/nfhHimf.png)

Ready to become the **ultimate archer** in Minecraft? The **Too Many Bows** mod is here to completely revolutionize your ranged combat experience with **exciting new bows**, each packed with unique abilities that will take your gameplay to a whole new level.

*   Current bow counter: **38** bows done!
*   For the most up to date information about this mod please refer to the [wiki](https://wiki.pixeldreamstudios.net/mods/too-many-bows)

***

### 🔄 **Seamless Compatibility with Better Combat**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/474/153/logo.png)**

To truly unlock the potential of this mod, we **strongly recommend using it with the [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus) mod**. Experience fluid, dynamic combat that makes every shot feel impactful and satisfying. The combination of **Too Many Bows** and **Better Combat** creates a thrilling archery experience unlike anything you've seen before.

***

### 🔧 **Dependencies ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lhGA9TYQ/05fe3a61c28faaccaec3533b92e1b321edde7bf6_96.webp)**     

 

This mod requires the [**Architectury API**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api) to function. Make sure to download it to enjoy the full experience!

***

### Version 3.0 for 1.21.1 (only) Adds:

### Attributes:

*   **Bow Draw Speed**     Controls how quickly bows can be drawn. Higher values reduce draw time.
*   **Bow Damage**     Increases base damage dealt by bow projectiles.
*   **Ranged Weapon Damage**     Affects damage scaling for ranged weapons and special bow projectiles.

### Trinkets/Curio items

*   Dead Eyes Pendant - Increase Crit change ( stackable )
*   Windwoven Gloves - Increase draw speed ( stackable )
*   Fletchers Talisman - Reduce durability taken on bows
*   Sharpshot Ring - Bow damage boost ( stackable)
*   Stormbound Signet - Bow damage boost ( stackable )

### All new trinkets are found in loot system

*   With this new attribute system other devs can create addon mods for **Too Many Bows** for more trinkets/Curio items!

***

### 🌟 **Ongoing Development**

This is just the beginning! We're constantly working to add even **more powerful bows**, **custom arrows**, and unique abilities to keep the game fresh and exciting. Stay tuned for updates that will introduce new bows, crafting materials, and special enchantments.

### 📋 **Download Now and Transform Your Archery Skills!**

Step into a world where your bow is your greatest ally. Download **Too Many Bows** today and experience the thrill of wielding powerful, unique bows that change the way you approach combat in Minecraft!

**Note**: More bows and updates are on the way – keep an eye out for future releases!

**[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PixelDreamStudios/SPEC_PixelDreamStudios_Promo.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/p/pixeldream)**
